shell.no_installable: No installable packages requested (allowlist: cmake, build-essential, g++, gcc, git, tmux, make)
shell.vllm_not_found: vLLM CLI not found on PATH.
shell.diffusers_needs_torch: Diffusers serving needs both diffusers and torch.
shell.pty_not_supported: PTY streaming is not supported on this platform
shell.docker_in_container_hint: Local Docker daemon access is disabled inside the Ulises container; a Docker CLI alone is not enough. Default Docker Compose intentionally does not mount the host Docker socket. Raw socket access is high-trust and can grant broad control over the host Docker daemon. If you accept that risk, enable docker/host-docker.yml. Remote server Docker workflows over SSH remain preferred.
shell.update_native_vllm: Using a vLLM CLI on PATH without Python package metadata; update it outside Ulises.
shell.update_native_llama_server: Using native llama-server on PATH; update it with its package manager or source checkout.
